title: K&F CONCEPT Electric Air Duster- Compressed Air Duster PC Cleaner, 110000RPM Air Blower, Speed Adjustable Mini Blower with Fast Charging, Dust Blower for Computer, Keyboard, House, Outdoor and Car
features: 【High-Performance Motor】Electric compressed air duster collector adopts a new generation of brush motor, which speed up to 110000RPM, has 120g strong wind power and cleaning power. Adjustable air speed design smoothly adjusts from the lowest speed to the highest speed, generating super strong airflow to clean different devices and remove debris and dust from any electronic equipment.

【Economical and Reusable】 Built-in 5000mAh Li-ion battery, the Cordless Compressed Air Cleaner Blower can work continuously for 22-150 minutes, USB-C cable charging design, which can be reused, perfectly replace the canned compressed air. LED lights will automatically light up, soot blowing and lighting are two in one, allowing you to easily clean dark corners. Ergonomic design brings great convenience to your cleaning.

【Multi-Scene Usage】The air pressure cleaner is ideal for various applications, not only cleaning the debris on the car internior, sofa, gap, air conditioner, computer, and keyboard, but also perfect for inflating air cushions, starting campfires, removing pet hair, and discovering other unexpected applications

【Easy to Carry & Simple Operation】Air duster electric nozzle small volume, space-saving and easy to carry. Comfortable in the hand, simple to operate , just flick the switch and you are ready to start your cleaning journey.

【Wide range of uses】Multi-function 5 sets of nozzles, different cleaning places, replacement of appropriate accessories, suitable for cleaning in different scenes, can clean computer keyboards, graphics cards, camera lenses and mechanical keyboards, seats and shutters, etc. 3 different shaped cleaning stiff brushes with FSD anti-static certification; Compressed air dust remover is the best choice for your home cleaning, industrial cleaning and car cleaning.
